title: Update dependency golangci/golangci-lint to v2.12.1
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|
| [golangci/golangci-lint](https://redirect.github.com/golangci/golangci-lint) | patch | `2.12.0` → `2.12.1` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>golangci/golangci-lint (golangci/golangci-lint)</summary>

### [`v2.12.1`](https://redirect.github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/blob/HEAD/CHANGELOG.md#v2121)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/compare/v2.12.0...v2.12.1)

*Released on 2026-05-01*

1. Linters bug fixes
   - `gomodguard_v2`: fix panic with migration suggestion
2. Misc.
   - fix `install.sh` script (if you are still using an URL based on the branch `master`, please update to use `https://golangci-lint.run/install.sh`)

</details>

---
